title: Ba`al #1179
definition:
Baal-hermon or Baal-chermon = "lord of destruction"

 1) a city near or on Mount Hermon, named as a seat of Baal worship
nasbUsage:
Definition: Baal-hermon or Baal-chermon = "lord of destruction"

 1) a city near or on Mount Hermon, named as a seat of Baal worship

    NASB:  Baal of Hermon, the center of Baal worship on Mt. Hermon
